[2026-03-26 00:58:16] luke_senpai: ```using System;

namespace usercode
{
    public class Triangle
    {
        // backing field
        private int size;

        // full property
        public int Size
        {
            get { return size; }
            set
            {
                if (value >= 1)
                    size = value;
                else
                    size = 1;
            }
        }

        // constructor
        public Triangle(int size)
        {
            Size = size; // use the property
        }

        // ZyBooks fix
        public Triangle()
        {
            Size = 1;
        }

        // left-aligned
        public void DisplayLeft()
        {
            for (int i = 1; i <= Size; i++)
            {
                for (int j = 1; j <= i; j++)
                {
                    Console.Write("*");
                }
                Console.WriteLine();
            }
        }

        // right-aligned
        public void DisplayRight()
        {
            for (int i = Size; i >= 1; i--)
            {
                // spaces
                for (int s = 0; s < Size - i; s++)
                {
                    Console.Write(" ");
                }
                
                // stars
                for (int j = 1; j <= i; j++)
                {
                    Console.Write("*");
                }

                Console.WriteLine();
            }
        }
    }
}```
[2026-03-26 00:59:10] luke_senpai: ```using System;
using usercode;

class Program
{
    static void Main()
    {
        // prompt for size
        Console.Write("Enter triangle size: ");
        int size = int.Parse(Console.ReadLine());

        // create the triangle
        Triangle triangle = new Triangle(size);

        // orientation
        Console.Write("Enter L for left or R for right: ");
        string choice = Console.ReadLine();

        // call appropriate method
        if (choice == "L")
        {
            triangle.DisplayLeft();
        }
        else if (choice == "R")
        {
            triangle.DisplayRight();
        }
        else
        {
            Console.WriteLine("Invalid input.");
        }
    }
}```
